channel.title: easy-vegan-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-vegan-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Vibrant Vegan Berry Smoothie Bowl with Protein Power
item.description: This berry smoothie bowl is bursting with fresh fruit and plant-based protein, making it a perfect energizing breakfast or post-workout boost. I love how the superfood toppings add texture and nutrition. So refreshing and colorful!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mixed berries (blueberries, raspberries, strawberries)
  • 1 frozen banana, peeled
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 scoop plant-based protein powder (vanilla or unflavored)
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 tablespoon ground flaxseed
  • Toppings: fresh berries, sliced banana, granola, shredded coconut, hemp seeds, and a drizzle of maple syrup

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Vibrant Vegan Berry Smoothie Bowl with Protein Power
media:content.media:description: This berry smoothie bowl is bursting with fresh fruit and plant-based protein, making it a perfect energizing breakfast or post-workout boost. I love how the superfood toppings add texture and nutrition. So refreshing and colorful!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, unsweetened

item.title: Creamy Vegan Avocado Spinach Smoothie Bowl for a Nutritious Start
item.description: This smoothie bowl combines ripe avocado and fresh spinach for a creamy, nutrient-rich breakfast or snack. It’s smooth, vibrant, and ready in minutes — perfect for when you want something wholesome and quick.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and pitted
  • 1 cup fresh spinach leaves, washed
  • 1 frozen banana
  • 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds
  • 1 teaspoon maple syrup (optional)
  • Toppings: sliced fresh fruit, granola, coconut flakes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #avocado #fresh #frozen

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Vegan Avocado Spinach Smoothie Bowl for a Nutritious Start
media:content.media:description: This smoothie bowl combines ripe avocado and fresh spinach for a creamy, nutrient-rich breakfast or snack. It’s smooth, vibrant, and ready in minutes — perfect for when you want something wholesome and quick.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, avocado, fresh, frozen

item.title: Fluffy Vegan Banana Pancakes with a Secret Ingredient for Perfect Texture
item.description: These vegan banana pancakes come out light and fluffy every time thanks to aquafaba, which whips the batter beautifully. Perfect for a cozy weekend brunch or a sweet breakfast treat. You'll love how naturally sweet and tender they are!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup all-purpose flour
  • 2 tablespoons sugar
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • 1 cup aquafaba (liquid from canned chickpeas)
  • 1 large ripe banana, mashed
  • 1/2 cup plant-based milk (almond or oat milk works well)
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil or melted coconut oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #allpurpose #sugar #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fluffy Vegan Banana Pancakes with a Secret Ingredient for Perfect Texture
media:content.media:description: These vegan banana pancakes come out light and fluffy every time thanks to aquafaba, which whips the batter beautifully. Perfect for a cozy weekend brunch or a sweet breakfast treat. You'll love how naturally sweet and tender they are!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, allpurpose, sugar, tablespoon

item.title: Easy Spring Nail Art Ideas to Brighten Your Day at Home
item.description: These simple spring nail ideas are a fun way to freshen up your look without leaving home. Featuring pastel colors and delicate floral designs, they're perfect for adding a little brightness to your day.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • Base coat nail polish, 1 coat
  • Pastel nail polish colors (pink, lavender, mint), 2 coats each
  • White nail polish for floral accents
  • Top coat nail polish, 1 coat
  • Dotting tool or toothpick for detailing
  • Nail polish remover and cotton swabs for cleanup

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #polish #pastel #white

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Spring Nail Art Ideas to Brighten Your Day at Home
media:content.media:description: These simple spring nail ideas are a fun way to freshen up your look without leaving home. Featuring pastel colors and delicate floral designs, they're perfect for adding a little brightness to your day.

item.title: Refreshing Vegan Chickpea Avocado Salad with Zesty Lemon-Tahini Dressing
item.description: This vibrant vegan salad blends creamy avocado and protein-rich chickpeas with a tangy lemon-tahini dressing. It’s light, fresh, and perfect for a quick lunch or easy spring dinner. So satisfying and bright!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 2 ripe avocados, peeled, pitted, and diced
  • 1 small red onion, finely chopped
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 3 tablespoons tahini
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chickpeas #avocados #small

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Refreshing Vegan Chickpea Avocado Salad with Zesty Lemon-Tahini Dressing
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan salad blends creamy avocado and protein-rich chickpeas with a tangy lemon-tahini dressing. It’s light, fresh, and perfect for a quick lunch or easy spring dinner. So satisfying and bright!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, chickpeas, avocados, small

item.title: Fresh and Vibrant Vegan Pea and Mint Soup for Spring Days
item.description: This bright pea and mint soup is such a refreshing way to welcome spring! Using frozen peas keeps it quick, while fresh mint adds a cool twist. I love serving it as a light lunch or starter when the sun’s out.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups frozen peas
  • 1 small onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, loosely packed
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Juice of 1 lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #small #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh and Vibrant Vegan Pea and Mint Soup for Spring Days
media:content.media:description: This bright pea and mint soup is such a refreshing way to welcome spring! Using frozen peas keeps it quick, while fresh mint adds a cool twist. I love serving it as a light lunch or starter when the sun’s out.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, small, cloves

item.title: Quick and Cozy Vegan Chickpea Curry with Spring Veggies
item.description: This vegan chickpea curry is a colorful, hearty meal packed with fresh spring vegetables and warming spices. It’s a go-to for busy nights when you want comfort without the hassle. Plus, the coconut milk adds a lovely creaminess!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons coconut oil, melted
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 tablespoon curry powder
  • 1 teaspoon ground cumin
  • 1 teaspoon turmeric
  • 1/2 teaspoon chili flakes (optional)
  • 1 can (14 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup snap peas, trimmed
  • 1 cup asparagus, cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 1 large carrot, sliced thin
  • 1 can (14 oz) coconut milk, full fat
  • 1 cup vegetable broth
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh cilantro, chopped for garnish
  • Juice of half a lime

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #coconut #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick and Cozy Vegan Chickpea Curry with Spring Veggies
media:content.media:description: This vegan chickpea curry is a colorful, hearty meal packed with fresh spring vegetables and warming spices. It’s a go-to for busy nights when you want comfort without the hassle. Plus, the coconut milk adds a lovely creaminess!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, coconut, medium, garlic

item.title: Easy Crispy Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Spring Greens and Tangy Sauce
item.description: This tofu stir-fry is a fresh, healthy weeknight winner. Pressing the tofu to crispy perfection is the trick here, and the tangy sauce brightens every bite. Perfect for a quick dinner when you want something light but satisfying!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 3 cups mixed spring greens (baby spinach, bok choy, pea shoots)
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 3 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 teaspoon sesame oil
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup or honey
  • 1 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons water
  • Sesame seeds, for garnish
  • Chopped green onions, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #extrafirm #vegetable #mixed

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Crispy Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Spring Greens and Tangy Sauce
media:content.media:description: This tofu stir-fry is a fresh, healthy weeknight winner. Pressing the tofu to crispy perfection is the trick here, and the tangy sauce brightens every bite. Perfect for a quick dinner when you want something light but satisfying!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, extrafirm, vegetable, mixed

item.title: Fresh Vegan Chickpea Salad with Creamy Avocado Dressing for Light Lunches
item.description: This vibrant chickpea salad mixes fresh spring veggies with a creamy avocado dressing that's tangy and smooth. I love how quick it comes together—perfect for a refreshing lunch or picnic on a sunny day!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 medium cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 red bell pepper, diced
  • 1/4 red onion, finely chopped
  • 1 ripe avocado
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 clove garlic, minced
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 tablespoons fresh cilantro or parsley, chopped

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chickpeas #cherry #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Vegan Chickpea Salad with Creamy Avocado Dressing for Light Lunches
media:content.media:description: This vibrant chickpea salad mixes fresh spring veggies with a creamy avocado dressing that's tangy and smooth. I love how quick it comes together—perfect for a refreshing lunch or picnic on a sunny day!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, chickpeas, cherry, medium

item.title: Vibrant Vegan Stir-Fry with Crispy Tofu and Tangy Tamari-Lime Sauce
item.description: This vegan stir-fry is a fresh, bright meal that comes together in under 30 minutes. Crispy tofu and spring greens get a zing from a tangy tamari-lime sauce. Great for a quick weeknight dinner when you want something light but satisfying!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz firm tofu, pressed and cut into 1-inch cubes
  • 2 tablespoons cornstarch
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 3 cups mixed spring greens (baby bok choy, snap peas, spinach)
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1-inch piece fresh ginger, grated
  • 3 tablespoons tamari or soy sauce
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lime juice
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 1 teaspoon toasted sesame oil
  • 1/4 cup chopped green onions
  • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pressed #cornstarch #vegetable

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Vibrant Vegan Stir-Fry with Crispy Tofu and Tangy Tamari-Lime Sauce
media:content.media:description: This vegan stir-fry is a fresh, bright meal that comes together in under 30 minutes. Crispy tofu and spring greens get a zing from a tangy tamari-lime sauce. Great for a quick weeknight dinner when you want something light but satisfying!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pressed, cornstarch, vegetable

item.title: Fresh Vegan Spring Soup with Tender Veggies and Bright Herbs
item.description: This light vegan soup is packed with tender spring veggies and fresh herbs. A splash of lemon juice adds a bright zing that really lifts the flavors. Perfect for a cozy lunch or a gentle dinner on cooler days.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, diced
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 medium carrots, peeled and sliced
  • 1 cup asparagus, cut into 1-inch pieces
  • 1 cup zucchini, diced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1/2 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh dill, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Salt and black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Vegan Spring Soup with Tender Veggies and Bright Herbs
media:content.media:description: This light vegan soup is packed with tender spring veggies and fresh herbs. A splash of lemon juice adds a bright zing that really lifts the flavors. Perfect for a cozy lunch or a gentle dinner on cooler days.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, cloves

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Greens
item.description: This vibrant vegan stir-fry is a lifesaver for busy nights. Crispy tofu soaked in a quick marinade pairs beautifully with fresh greens in a savory sauce. Ready in just 30 minutes—perfect for a healthy dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 14 oz firm tofu, pressed and cubed
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce or tamari
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 1 tablespoon sesame oil
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 2 cups broccoli florets
  • 2 cups baby spinach or kale
  • 1/2 cup sliced green onions
  • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds
  • Cooked jasmine or brown rice, to serve

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pressed #sauce #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Vegan Tofu Stir-Fry with Fresh Greens
media:content.media:description: This vibrant vegan stir-fry is a lifesaver for busy nights. Crispy tofu soaked in a quick marinade pairs beautifully with fresh greens in a savory sauce. Ready in just 30 minutes—perfect for a healthy dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pressed, sauce, tablespoon
